name: mojo-depthwise-conv-backward-shapes
description: Pattern for adding shape-verification tests for depthwise conv backward passes in Mojo. Use when: (1) adding backward pass tests for depthwise convolution variants, (2) verifying DepthwiseConv2dNoBiasGradient tensor shapes, (3) mirroring existing conv_no_bias_backward shape tests for depthwise kernels.
